summary: Vertical handheld footage, posted by a U.S. Border Patrol official, shot inside a dim residential interior. The camera moves past a partly open door to show several people lying close together on the floor of a small room in dark clothing, then pans across cluttered household items including a stroller and bags on a stained floor, and a further room where more people lie along a wall beside a hanging shirt and scattered belongings. The footage is shaky and low-light with no on-screen text. There is no music; the audio is ambient.

script.scene: View through a partly open interior door of two or more people lying on the floor of a small dark room in dark hooded clothing; a doorknob is in the foreground.
The camera pans across a cluttered floor with a stroller, boxes and bags in low light.
A further room where several people lie along a wall on the floor beside a hanging shirt, water bottles and scattered belongings.
